posts.author: ArthurJ
posts.title: We Need to Stop Letting Democrats Casually Commit Felonies With No Consequences

link_metadata.description: Calls to hold Democrats accountable for alleged felony crimes and lawlessness in politics.
link_metadata.title: We Need to Stop Letting Democrats Casually Commit Felonies With No Consequences

posts.raw_content:
Let’s talk about a glaring double standard that we’ve all been forced to accept as normal.

For years, we’ve watched deep-blue strongholds like San Francisco, Chicago, and New York declare themselves "Sanctuary Cities." They openly defy federal immigration laws, refuse to cooperate with ICE, and use local taxpayer dollars to fund policies that align entirely with progressive ideology. The left defends this under the guise of local sovereignty and "protecting their communities."

If that is the new precedent in this country—that cities can unilaterally decide to become ideological safe havens and ignore laws that conflict with their political worldview—then why aren't we playing by the same rules?

If there are sanctuary cities for progressive policies, there is absolutely zero reason we shouldn't have dedicated, recognized Liberty Sanctuaries—cities exclusively built around right-leaning, constitutional values.

Think about it. If local municipalities can legally shield themselves to protect progressive interests, conservatives should be utilizing that exact same legal framework to protect our fundamental rights and way of life.

What would a true Conservative Sanctuary City look like?

Total Second Amendment Sanctuaries: Zero local enforcement of unconstitutional federal gun grabs. Complete recognition of constitutional carry.

Economic Freedom Zones: A hard, constitutional cap on local property and income taxes. A massive stripping away of the bureaucratic red tape that kills small businesses.

Free Speech & Anti-Woke Mandates: Strict protections against DEI/ESG mandates in local business and government. A total ban on biological men in women's sports and private spaces.

Law and Order Enforcement: No revolving-door justice. A fully funded police force with prosecutors who actually prosecute property crimes, theft, and violence to the fullest extent of the law.

Medical Freedom: Permanent bans on any future local or federal mask or vaccine mandates.

The left has realized that if you consolidate power at the hyper-local level, you can build a wall against the policies you despise. They’ve been doing it for decades. We’ve been playing defense, hoping the federal or state courts will save us, while they are actively building progressive enclaves on our dime.

It’s time we stop complaining about their sanctuary cities and start building our own bastions of constitutional liberty. If they can build a wall around their ideology, we have every right to build one around our freedoms.
